name: Southwestern Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 red or green bell pepper, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add garlic, bell pepper, and onion; sauté until soft.
3. Stir in flour and cook for 2 minutes on medium heat.
4. Add picante sauce, vegetable broth, and creamed corn; stir to combine.
5. Simmer the mixture for 5 minutes.
6. Stir in potatoes and corn kernels.
7. Mix in salsa con queso and half and half until heated through.
8. Serve hot, garnished with green onions and shredded Cheddar cheese if desired.
